Hero.headline: Software Developer
Hero.summary: I build fast, accessible web apps with React and TypeScript. I enjoy turning complex problems into simple, reliable interfaces.

About.title: About
About.subtitle: A quick snapshot of who you are and what you’re looking for. Keep this skimmable and impact-focused.
About.p1: Write 3–5 sentences about your strengths, the kind of products you like building, and the roles you’re targeting. Mention any specialties (e.g. performance, design systems, accessibility, full-stack).
About.p2: If you’re early-career, focus on what you’ve shipped and what you can do today. If you’re experienced, highlight scope, ownership, and measurable outcomes.

Projects.title: Projects
Projects.subtitle: Show 2–4 projects with clear outcomes. Link to a live demo when possible.

Contact.title: Contact
Contact.subtitle: Make it easy to reach you. A simple mailto link is enough for now.
Contact.fastest: The fastest way to reach me is by email.

amori.title: Amori
amori.description: Journal for tracking relationship milestones and memories.

quartermark.title: QuarterMark
quartermark.description: Jackbox-style party game for New Year's.

yeetcraft.title: Yeetcraft
yeetcraft.description: Leaderboard tracker for friendly banter—tracks mistakes across a friend group.

lineup.title: LineUp
lineup.description: Co-developed a social + marketplace platform for freelance musicians to showcase skills and get hired. Also used as a bachelor semester project.
